params.name: Unispark
params.source:
* Koryeo Treasure Map (0.01%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.07%)
* 40 fragments from [[Fissure#Fissure Dungeons|Fissure]] floor 175 "Seaul Base"
* Unispark Activation chance
params.description:
On Aug 25, 1913, 7 adventurers found the Unispark Cube.

A strange cube was found on the Colorado River. It was a huge energy source from ancient times, which could provide energy for several organisms or power a machine forever, and could activate robots. Its shape would change according to the shape of the holder, but its energy capacity would remain the same. It was very easy to carry and install.
